title: GlobalLogic and Akamai Announce Partnership to Deliver Enterprise Technology Solutions & Services
text: Partnership results in enhanced customer offerings powered by Digital Solutions and Cloud CAMBRIDGE, Mass. , Oct. 24, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- GlobalLogic Inc., a Hitachi Group company and leader in Digital Engineering services, and Akamai (NASDAQ: AKAM), the cloud company that powers and protects life online announced a strategic partnership intended to make a broad range of enterprise technology solutions available to customers globally.

title: Akamai Technologies Acquires Select Customer Contracts from Lumen
text: CAMBRIDGE, Mass. , Oct. 10, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Akamai Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: AKAM), the cloud company that powers and protects life online, today announces that it has acquired assets, including select content delivery customer contracts, from Lumen Technologies, Inc. Akamai will extend its offerings and support to Lumen customers looking for an enterprise solution to their content delivery needs, providing them the ability to leverage the world's most distributed cloud platform.

title: Akamai Technologies To Hold Third Quarter 2023 Investor Conference Call On Tuesday, November 7, at 4:30 PM ET
